author: nottherealtar
install_msg: Classic GIF is now **`[p]coffee order`** or **`/coffee order`** (was `[p]coffee`). Daily streak: **`/coffee checkin`** in a server. See **`/coffee`** subcommands: streak, titles, board.
name: coffee
short: Virtual coffee orders and daily check-in streaks
description: Pour a virtual coffee (GIF), daily UTC check-ins with streaks, silly titles from best streak, and guild leaderboards (current/best/total).
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-guild per-member last check-in date (UTC), current streak, best streak, and total check-ins for titles and leaderboards.
